action.summary: Apply a narrow registration repair for `residual_vq_topk` inside `sparsify/` and relaunch the exact same proxy target. Do not change the experiment recipe; only make the architecture name legal and constructible by the existing config/factory flow.
action.expected_win: Unblock a strategically different low-K family and obtain its first comparable proxy FVU; any clean run is more informative than another retune on families already shown weak.
action.self_review: This is a tight repair scoped directly to the observed `Unknown architecture` error. It preserves the original experiment exactly and avoids mixing in any new search variable.
